title: Obamacraft: The Great Plague
description: This modpack is the next modpack in the Obamacraft lineup. This modpack is in early development.
body:
# Obamacraft presents: The Great Plauge

**Step** into a world where survival is a race against time. Several viruses have destroyed the world as we once knew it, and now even more are showing themselves. The newest threat is a Spore, a dynamic and destructive virus, capable of spreading across the environment and consuming everything in its path.

**Travel** around the post apocalyptic world, where civilization is holding on by a thread.

## This modpack features:

- [Fungal Infection:Spore](https://modrinth.com/mod/fungal-infectionspore)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Lost Cites](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-lost-cities/versions)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- Yung's Everything
- And much... much... more
